description: Implement a "Curated Cross-Sell" feature for the Urban Electronics store. Add an entity reference field to the 'Default' product type labeled 'Related Accessories' (machine name: field_related_accessories) referencing 'Product' with unlimited values. Configure the 'Default' product display to show this field as a 'Rendered entity' using the 'Teaser' view mode. For the 'Apple MacBook Pro 16"', add 'Logitech MX Master 3S' and 'Sony WH-1000XM5' to the 'Related Accessories' field. The admin credentials are admin / Admin1234!.
